title: The Apostle
description: Airing from a secret location, The Apostle gives you the uncomfortable truth, including the real rules of The Running Man.
altHero: The Apostle, a masked man in colorful clothing
alt1: The Apostle imposed over security footage from The Running Man: target acquired outside Twerk City
alt2: The Apostle imposed over camera footage of contestant in a fast food joint
alt3: The Apostle holding a VHS tape labeled The Running Man Season 5 Episode 13
alt4: The Apostle holding up six fingers
